holdings.n: China Northern Rare Earth (Group) High-Tech Co.,Ltd

holdings.infoBox: EMET is an equity ETF with a total of 64 individual holdings. The top holdings are Freeport-McMoRan stock at 8.59%, Glencore at 8.41%, Anglo American at 8.18%, Grupo Mexico Sab De Cv at 6.67%, and Teck Resources at 5.94%.

overview.description: The VanEck Copper and Green Metals ETF (EMET) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MVIS Global Clean-Tech Metals index, a market-cap-weighted index of global companies involved in mining, refining, and recycling of metals and rare earth elements that are used in technologies contributing to clean energy transition. EMET was launched on Nov 9, 2021 and is issued by VanEck.
